original text:
SEDA seeks to provide a supportive teaching and learning environment that is responsive to individual student needs. Whilst students are encouraged to develop a positive relationship with their Program Facilitator, the Student Services Coordinator is also integral to supporting the student journey.
The Student Services Coordinator is responsible for providing students with appropriate support related to their personal wellbeing and the development of their individual pathways. The Student Services Coordinator supports students to remain engaged with learning by assisting them to access appropriate health and community-based programs and youth services in a timely manner.
The Student Services Coordinator is also responsible for providing access to required further education and employment information, supporting Program Facilitators to assist students when making choices regarding their individual pathways.
Students also have access to comprehensive wellbeing information and resources via SEDA's learning management system, MySEDA. If you would like to get in touch directly with Student Services, please email lisb@sedagroup.com.au or call us on 1300 777 332.
